scripts.dev: npm run build:product && npm run build:order && concurrently -n product,order,client -c blue,green,cyan "node packages/product-service/dist/main.js" "node packages/order-service/dist/main.js" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w product-service && npm run build -w order-service && npm run build -w client && npm run seed
scripts.start: concurrently -n product,order,client -c blue,green,cyan "node packages/product-service/dist/main.js" "node packages/order-service/dist/main.js" "npm run start -w client"
